_rationale: Overview on the multi-directory `populated` corpus (api=4/core=3/utils=2/web=1 files across Go/Python/TypeScript with pure vs impure functions and a branch-heavy validator). Unlike the flat 4-file `multi-lang` corpus, this exercises the real engine path that was hardcoded before: per-directory REPOSITORY MAP, computed complexity, smell detection with object IDs, and the OBJECT IDs workflow hint. Distinct per-module file counts make the module sort order deterministic (Go relies on map-iteration order for ties).

tiers._rationale_stable: Byte-identical after masking the genuinely non-deterministic / known-divergent fragments below. What remains under guard: the LCF header + computed token count (modules*20+health50+20=150), the full per-directory REPOSITORY MAP (names + file counts), the average complexity, and every detailed_smells line (severity/type/symbol/location). That is the substance that was previously faked.

text_normalize._rationale_replace: [o=XX] object ids are non-deterministic even within the Go binary run-to-run (symbol-id assignment depends on concurrent index order) — masked to [o=*] on both sides. The `smells:` summary line is emitted from a Go map (random token order: Go's own overview and unified disagree) — C++ sorts it, so the line is order-masked. The `purity` value line and `effects` line are masked because Go's side-effect classification is async and timing-dependent (observed 0/0 mid-index vs 15/11 complete) and C++'s classification depth differs; the `purity:` header + query line stay under guard. `problematic_symbols` is masked+removed because C++'s cyclomatic-complexity / outgoing-reference thresholds put ValidateName at risk>=5 while Go scores it lower (identical risk formula, divergent upstream cc/ref counts) — tracked as a follow-up; aggregate complexity is byte-checked. The high-incoming-refs smell is normalized because C++ renames Go's mislabeled `shotgun-surgery` to the accurate `high-fan-in`. The `== VOCABULARY ==` section is a C++-only enhancement (low-discoverability naming signal) with no Go counterpart, so the whole block is stripped before comparison.
